subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Most Glorious, Most Exalted, Most Great, Most Holy, Self-Subsisting Lord, Who through one blessed word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت امجد ارفع اعظم اقدس قیوم را لایق و سزاست که بیک کلمه مبارکه که از
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
